sentences.translation: Moja nova kancelarija je svijetla i veoma organizovana.
sentences.translationEn: My new office is bright and very organized.

sentences.arabic: أَبْدَأُ عَمَلِي فِي السَّاعَةِ الثَّامِنَةِ صَبَاحًا كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Svaki dan počinjem sa radom u osam sati ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: I start my work at eight o'clock in the morning every day.

sentences.arabic: أَسْتَخْدِمُ الْحَاسُوبَ لِكِتَابَةِ التَّقَارِيرِ وَإِرْسَالِ الرَّسَائِلِ.
sentences.translation: Koristim kompjuter za pisanje izvještaja i slanje poruka.
sentences.translationEn: I use the computer to write reports and send messages.

sentences.arabic: زُمَلَائِي فِي الْعَمَلِ مُتَعَاوِنُونَ وَلُطَفَاءُ جِدًّا مَعِي.
sentences.translation: Moje kolege na poslu su veoma susretljive i ljubazne prema meni.
sentences.translationEn: My colleagues at work are very cooperative and kind to me.
